name: Side Comments origin

releases.author: jepicaju862-lab
releases.description:
# Side Comments origin v1.0.2

A focused reliability and workflow update for the Obsidian side-comment annotation experience.

This release improves comment anchoring, storage stability, navigation accuracy, and annotation flexibility.

## ✨ New Features

* Added **Per-File Comment Storage**

  * Comments are now stored as separate JSON files by source document
  * Default data folder: `side-note-data`
  * Improves maintainability for larger vaults and multi-file workflows

* Added **Precise Backlink Copy**

  * Copy a backlink callout that links directly back to the original annotated text

* Added **Orphaned Comment Prompt**

  * When comments lose their original source text, the plugin can prompt users to delete or keep them
  * Orphaned comments can still be reviewed before cleanup

---

## 🛠 Improvements

* Improved comment relocation logic with a multi-step matching strategy:

  * Context anchor matching
  * Selected-text hash matching
  * Legacy plain-text fallback

* Improved stability when notes are edited, moved, or renamed

* Improved sidebar behavior:

  * Preserves scroll position after re-rendering
  * Uses smoother comment highlighting behavior
  * Reduces unwanted sidebar jumping

* Improved comment card interactions:

  * Double-click to edit comments
  * Expand or collapse long selected text and comment content
  * Better active-comment state synchronization

* Improved image handling in comments:

  * Reuses existing pasted images when possible
  * Avoids duplicate attachment creation through image hashing

* Improved settings page:

  * Added configurable comment data folder
  * Added highlight opacity control
  * Added orphaned comment count and cleanup button

---

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

* Fixed comment position drift after source text changes
* Fixed cases where comments could become orphaned too easily
* Fixed sidebar scroll reset after comment list refresh
* Fixed duplicated pasted image attachments
* Fixed inconsistent highlight color rendering between editor and sidebar
* Fixed toolbar overlap behavior when comment modal is open
* Fixed comment data migration from old `data.json` storage
* Fixed stale per-file comment JSON cleanup when comments are deleted

---

## ⚠️ Notes

* Existing comments remain compatible
* Older comments are automatically migrated with missing hash/orphan metadata when possible
* Comments previously stored in `data.json` are migrated into per-file storage
* If you change the comment data folder, restart the plugin afterward
* Recommended to update plugin files and CSS together

---

## 📦 Repository

[Side Comments origin on GitHub](https://github.com/jepicaju862-lab/Side-Comments-origin)

releases.author: jepicaju862-lab
releases.description:
# Side Comments origin v1.0.1

A major usability and stability update for the Obsidian annotation experience.

## ✨ New Features

* Added **Selection Toolbar**

  * Quickly add comments after selecting text
  * Fast color switching support

* Added **Hover Tooltip Preview**

  * Preview comment content directly from highlighted text
  * Markdown rendering supported

* Added **Markdown Export**

  * Export all comments from the current document into a structured Markdown summary

* Added **Markdown Backup Support**

  * Store comments as standalone Markdown files for backup and synchronization

* Added **Image Paste & Drag Support**

  * Paste screenshots directly into comments
  * Automatic attachment saving and link generation

* Added **Sidebar Sorting**

  * Sort comments by:

    * Timestamp
    * Position in file

* Added **Global Comment Search**

---

## 🛠 Improvements

* Improved editor highlight rendering
* Improved comment navigation performance
* Improved Markdown rendering consistency
* Better attachment folder management
* Optimized sidebar card interactions
* Enhanced tooltip positioning behavior

---

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

* Fixed popup menu clipping and z-index overlay issues
* Fixed toolbar visibility problems in some themes
* Fixed incorrect scroll positioning when locating comments
* Fixed orphaned comment detection edge cases
* Fixed image rendering issues in tooltip previews
* Fixed multiple UI overflow problems

---

## ⚠️ Notes

* Existing comments remain fully compatible
* Recommended to update both plugin files and custom CSS snippets
* Orphaned comments can now be cleaned up directly from settings

---

## 📦 Repository

[Side Comments on GitHub](https://github.com/jepicaju862-lab/Side-Comments-origin)
